title: National Grid Electricity Transmission (Scotland to England Green Link 2): compulsory purchase order 2023
body: "The Order authorises National Grid Electricity Transmission the compulsory acquisition of land and rights in land.  Date of decision  12 February 2025  Location   Scotland to England Green Link 2Subsea High Voltage Direct Current Link (HVDC)From Peterhead, Aberdeenshire to Drax, North Yorkshire   Type of project / consent requested  Compulsory Purchase Order under the Electricity Act 1989 and Acquisition of Land Act 1981.  Maximum output  Not applicable. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
